allow: Bash(python -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\) for f in ['espocrm_service.py', 'config.py', 'main.py', 'database.py']]; print\('OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "from config import settings; sp = settings.SYSTEM_PROMPT; print\(f'chars={len\(sp\)}, lineas={sp.count\(chr\(10\)\)}, tokens_approx={len\(sp\)//4}'\)")
